title: Platytinospora buchholzii
taxonomy: Platytinospora buchholzii is a species of plant in the family Gomortegaceae. It is native to the tropical rainforests of West Africa. The classification of Platytinospora buchholzii is within the kingdom Plantae, and its exact classification is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - angiosperms, clade - eudicots, clade - asterids, order - Laurales, family - Gomortegaceae, genus - Platytinospora.
